title: Tensor Decomposition for Cryptocurrency Market Microstructure: Beyond Matrix Methods
description: Tensor decomposition framework for cryptocurrency market microstructure achieving 96.55% explained variance with rank-4 CP decomposition, outperforming traditional PCA by 4.24 percentage points. Using one year of hourly OHLCV data for BTC, ETH, and SOL from Binance, we reveal low-dimensional manifold structure with interpretable factors corresponding to market-wide trends, asset-specific dynamics, volatility regimes, and microstructure noise.
notes: Working paper proposing tensor decomposition methods for cryptocurrency market analysis. Code available at: https://github.com/resurrexi/tensor-defi
